trigger_queries.query: I need to create an agent for managing background tasks. Load the right hf skills.
Audit the entire skill ecosystem for drift and quality compliance.
Refactor the skills to reduce technical debt and improve structure.
I need to implement the authentication module with TDD.
assertions: Does NOT load any hf-* skill bundle

trigger_queries.query: Synthesize a new skill from this GitHub repo and compress the patterns.
Create a skill with TDD for quality validation.
assertions: hf-l2-use-authoring-skills already covers TDD for skills

rich_source_evidence.claim: Meta-builder task-to-skill routing with 8 domain bundles + FLEXIBLE cross-routes
rich_source_evidence.evidence: SKILL.md defines 8 domains with 1-3 skills each. Two documented FLEXIBLE cross-routes with justification.

rich_source_evidence.claim: Multiple routing strategies including cross-lineage resolution
rich_source_evidence.evidence: Single-domain, multi-domain, FLEXIBLE hm-* cross-routes when no hf-* skill covers the domain.

rich_source_evidence.claim: Cross-references to 9 sibling skills + 8 domain-referenced skills
rich_source_evidence.evidence: 9 skills in Cross-References table. 8 domain bundles with documented lineage boundaries.

rich_source_evidence.claim: Structured routing with decision tree and FLEXIBLE lineage rules
rich_source_evidence.evidence: 7 loading rules. Multi-domain resolution decision tree. FLEXIBLE justification requirement.
SKILL.md + references/routing-map.md with detailed signal tables and exclusion rules.
Domain-based routing adapts. FLEXIBLE lineage allows hm-* cross-routes. Exclusion rules for non-hf-* tasks.

rich_source_evidence.claim: Honest gap tracking with documented cross-lineage exceptions
rich_source_evidence.evidence: 4 anti-patterns. Two FLEXIBLE cross-routes documented. Unjustified Cross-Routing anti-pattern.

rich_source_evidence.claim: This evals file + metrics scorecard on disk
